Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina 2022 Cantonal Assembly Results

Switch between a winner-by-canton map and a party gradient view where color intensity shows how strongly each canton voted for the selected party.

Vs federation average

Display Mode

Winner map: each canton is colored by the party that finished first there.

How To Read

This view uses official CIK BiH cantonal assembly results. The map is rendered as a canton map: only canton boundaries are drawn, and each canton is labeled once.

Hover Over A Unit

The side panel will show the winning party and the full party vote totals for the hovered canton.
